description: Margaret Chen (DOB: 1962-08-15) is presenting for pre-operative clearance before her elective right total hip arthroplasty next week. Complete her pre-operative evaluation: document today's encounter with vitals (BP 142/88, HR 76, Temp 98.4 F, RR 16, SpO2 97%, Wt 176 lbs, Ht 63 in), perform a perioperative medication safety review, order indicated pre-operative labs, and write a clearance note summarizing your findings and recommendations. Login: admin/pass.
